HISTORICAL REAL DATA: mid-level SoCal premier team 2007; $900 base (tournaments not included); baseline for inflation tracking; by 2018 same tier = $1850 (+105%); by 2025 estimated $2600-3800 (+3x from 2007)

HISTORICAL REAL DATA 2018-19 season OC/SoCal: smaller clubs $1700; mid-level same tier as 2007 now $1850 (+105%); top large club U-littles up to $3000; Legends Flight 3 $1000; does not include uniforms (additional $300+) or all tournaments; confirms ~10-15%/yr fee inflation trend

HISTORICAL REAL DATA: East Coast (Boston area) 2018 for competitive travel girl U11; $3000 tuition + $500 kit + 10 tournaments x$125=$1250 + $4000 east coast travel = ~$9000 total; illustrates regional variation — SoCal similar total when travel added despite lower base fees

REAL DATA: Beach FC Long Beach ECNL registration $3000 (does not include uniforms or other fees); ECNL LA club separately reported $4500 base (not including uniforms/travel); all-in ~$5000; uniform $400 estimate; guest player issue reported — paid players benched for higher-flight guest players

REAL DATA (coach self-reported): small non-ECNL community club all-in ~$2000 including uniforms and tournaments; confirms 2-2.5x cost premium for large brand clubs over small clubs with similar or better development outcomes

REAL DATA: PSG Academy Los Angeles $4000 annual fee (user-reported 2024); branded European club academy in LA market; does not include uniforms/tournaments; typical all-in estimate $6000-7000; illustrates premium pricing for European brand name in top US market
